indicators.name: large windows
indicators.rationale: Large windows allow natural light to flood the space, reducing the need for artificial lighting and potentially reducing eye strain.

indicators.name: low ceiling beams
indicators.rationale: Low ceiling beams may obstruct the view and create a sense of confinement, which can be distracting for focused work.

indicators.name: open layout
indicators.rationale: An open layout can lead to distractions from other people and activities in the space.

indicators.name: couch
indicators.rationale: A couch is not suitable for prolonged computer work as it lacks a flat surface and does not provide ergonomic support.

indicators.name: bar stools
indicators.rationale: Bar stools are not designed for extended computer use and do not provide ergonomic support.

reasoning_summary: The space is marginally adequate for computer work (Solo). While the large windows provide natural light, the low ceiling beams and open layout can be distracting. The presence of a couch and bar stools suggests a more casual, social atmosphere rather than a focused work environment.
